translations.en: I’ll take a portion of fries.
translations.es: Una ración de patatas fritas, por favor.
translations.fr: Une portion de frites, s’il vous plaît.
translations.it: Una porzione di patatine fritte, per favore.
translations.pt: Uma porção de batatas fritas, por favor.
translations.vi: Cho tôi một phần khoai tây chiên.
translations.uk: Мені, будь ласка, порцію картоплі фрі.
translations.hi: मुझे फ्राइज़ की एक प्लेट चाहिए।
translations.id: Saya mau satu porsi kentang goreng.
translations.ro: O porție de cartofi prăjiți, vă rog.
translations.ja: フライドポテトを一つください。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive predicate selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Portion'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; head of the object noun phrase.
Common noun; plural; bare noun specifying the type in a measure/food construction after 'Portion' (type complement; form is case‑ambiguous in plural).

sentences.target: Die Portion ist zu groß für mich.
sentences.reading: /diː pɔʁˈtsi̯oːn ɪst tsuː ɡʁoːs fyːɐ̯ mɪç./

translations.de: Die Portion ist zu groß für mich.
translations.ipa: /diː pɔʁˈtsi̯oːn ɪst tsuː ɡʁoːs fyːɐ̯ mɪç./
translations.en: The portion is too big for me.
translations.es: La ración es demasiado grande para mí.
translations.fr: La portion est trop grande pour moi.
translations.it: La porzione è troppo grande per me.
translations.ru: Эта порция для меня слишком большая.
translations.pt: A porção é grande demais para mim.
translations.tr: Benim için bu porsiyon çok büyük.
translations.vi: Phần này quá lớn đối với tôi.
translations.ar: هذه الكمية كبيرة جدًا بالنسبة لي.
translations.nl: Deze portie is te groot voor mij.
translations.uk: Ця порція для мене надто велика.
translations.hu: Ez az adag nekem túl nagy.
translations.hi: यह परोसन मेरे लिए बहुत बड़ा है।
translations.pl: Ta porcja jest dla mnie za duża.
translations.el: Η μερίδα είναι πολύ μεγάλη για μένα.
translations.nb: Denne porsjonen er for stor for meg.
translations.sv: Den här portionen är för stor för mig.
translations.ro: Porția este prea mare pentru mine.
translations.cs: Tahle porce je na mě moc velká.
translations.da: Portionen er for stor til mig.
translations.ja: この量は私には多すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner of 'Portion'.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the copular clause.
Auxiliary 'sein' used as copula; present, 3rd person singular; links subject and predicate complement.
Degree adverb meaning 'too'; modifies the adjective 'groß'.
Adjective; positive degree; used predicatively as the complement of the copula.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a prepositional phrase expressing reference/beneficiary.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Ich hätte gern eine Portion Reis.

translations.de: Ich hätte gern eine Portion Reis.
translations.en: I would like a portion of rice.
translations.es: Una ración de arroz, por favor.
translations.fr: Je voudrais une portion de riz.
translations.pt: Queria uma porção de arroz, por favor.
translations.nl: Ik wil graag een portie rijst.
translations.hi: मुझे चावल की एक प्लेट चाहिए।
translations.ro: O porție de orez, vă rog.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; Konjunktiv II (subjunctive II), present, 1st person singular; used with 'gern' to express a polite desire ('would like').
Adverb modifying the verb; marks preference/desire in the periphrasis 'hätte gern'.
Indefinite article; feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Portion'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'hätte (gern)'.
Common noun; masculine mass noun; bare type specification after the measure noun 'Portion'.

sentences.target: Er teilt die Portion mit seiner Schwester.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ taɪ̯lt diː pɔʁˈtsi̯oːn mɪt ˈzaɪ̯nɐ ˈʃvɛstɐ./

translations.de: Er teilt die Portion mit seiner Schwester.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ taɪ̯lt diː pɔʁˈtsi̯oːn mɪt ˈzaɪ̯nɐ ˈʃvɛstɐ./
translations.en: He shares the portion with his sister.
translations.es: Él comparte la porción con su hermana.
translations.fr: Il partage la portion avec sa sœur.
translations.it: Condivide la porzione con sua sorella.
translations.ko: 그는 그 조각을 여동생과 나눠 먹어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他把这份和妹妹分着吃。
translations.pt: Ele divide a porção com a irmã.
translations.he: הוא חולק את המנה עם אחותו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy chia phần đó với em gái mình.
translations.nl: Hij deelt de portie met zijn zus.
translations.hi: वह यह हिस्सा अपनी बहन के साथ बाँटता है।
translations.pl: On dzieli się porcją ze swoją siostrą.
translations.el: Μοιράζεται τη μερίδα με την αδελφή του.
translations.nb: Han deler porsjonen med søsteren sin.
translations.sv: Han delar portionen med sin syster.
translations.ro: El împarte porția cu sora lui.
translations.cs: Dělí se o porci se svou sestrou.
translations.da: Han deler portionen med sin søster.
translations.ja: 彼はその分を妹と分け合います。
